summary: Hero uses a right-aligned anatomy globe (SVG orbit shell + figure) with mouse-parallax pan on a warm parchment background. The live component (AmbientEditorialHero) renders a 1200×1200 SVG that includes: outer shell circle, two orbit ellipses, axis, latitude arcs, annotation tick lines, a study-curve sub-group, and a full torso figure group. BrandMark is a 28×28 globe icon with two arc strokes in teal (#5a7f88), a gold vertical axis (#c29a56), and a single gold dot — compositionally coherent with the hero globe. The design-review page exposes 8 hero directions and 50 logo options behind auth. Frontpage-01 SVG confirms the visual language: warm #F6F1E8 fill, very low-opacity shell/orbit strokes (8–14%), faint annotation notes, and a sparse torso figure with a gold accent spine.
recommendations: Strip the annotation tick group and the study-curve sub-group from the hero SVG
Reduce the orbit ellipse count from 3 to 1, and drop the secondary latitude arc
Raise the hero-anatomy-body stroke opacity from ~0.26 to 0.38–0.44 and the organ stroke from 0.22 to 0.34
Lock BrandMark to the globe-axis language: increase the gold vertical axis stroke from 0.74 to 1.1 and bump the gold dot radius from 1.12 to 1.6

skills: anatomy-globe hero: shell + single orbit + axis + figure body is the minimum viable premium system; annotation plates and study curves are clutter not signal
BrandMark echo: gold vertical axis in logo must visually match hero accent spine to hold system coherence
durable_memory: ChapAI hero visual language: warm parchment (#F6F1E8 / rgba(251,249,243)), teal primary (#5a7f88 / #5D7E87), gold accent (#c29a56 / #C89D60), dark ink (#1f262b), low-opacity globe anatomy field right-aligned
Hero anatomy SVG structure: shell circle → orbit ellipse → axis path → latitude arc → figure group → glow div; annotation and study-curve groups are optional decoration, currently too noisy
8 hero directions under /design-review; direction 01 (wide anatomy orbit) is the live reference; direction 06 (open minimal clinic) is the Apple-quiet fallback if creator response to anatomy is cold
50 logo options under /brand/options/chapai-option-[n].svg — no winner selected yet as of 2026-04-01
active_context: Goal: creator outreach launch gate — homepage must read premium without a redesign sprint
Blocking decision: logo option winner not yet selected; hero annotation cut is unblocked and should ship first
Design review page is auth-gated at /design-review; uses DASHBOARD_AUTH_COOKIE

current_blocker: No logo direction has been selected from the 50 options. The hero cuts (recommendations 1–3) are fully unblocked in code, but the brand system cannot be called complete until a logo option is approved. This is a human decision — no file change can resolve it.
suggested_human_fix: Open /design-review, pick one logo option from the 50. Narrow criteria: (a) gold axis visible at 20px, (b) readable without the 'ChapAI' wordmark beside it, (c) globe silhouette readable in single color. Decide in one sitting — do not run a committee. Once selected, replace BrandMark.tsx SVG paths with the winner's geometry and apply recommendation 4 (thicken gold axis + dot). Then ship recommendations 1–3 as a single PR.
next_task: Cut the annotation and study-curve groups from AmbientEditorialHero.tsx (recommendations 1–2), raise figure stroke opacity (recommendation 3), commit as 'hero: tighten anatomy field for creator launch', then block on logo pick before touching BrandMark.
